# Cristian Dotta

> Senior Backend Engineer with 13+ years building high-scale APIs and distributed systems in TypeScript and Node.js. Most recently Tech Lead of the Exchange team at Exodus (NYSE American: EXOD), owning a public API serving 1.5M monthly active users and ~12M requests/day. Hands-on Solidity (upgradeable smart contracts, cross-chain bridges, Chainlink) and a daily practitioner of AI-augmented engineering. Open to senior backend / distributed-systems roles, remote across the Americas.

## About

- **Role:** Senior Backend Engineer — high-scale APIs & distributed systems
- **Location:** Montevideo, Uruguay — remote (Americas time zones)
- **Experience:** 13+ years
- **Core stack:** TypeScript / Node.js, distributed systems, event-driven & async processing (Kafka, BullMQ), PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB, AWS (incl. Lambda), Kubernetes, Docker
- **Differentiators:** production Solidity (upgradeable contracts, Hyperlane cross-chain bridges, Arbitrum, Chainlink); AI-augmented engineering (Claude Code, custom agent skills, MCP integrations, LLM APIs)

## Highlights

- Tech Lead of the Exchange team at Exodus (NYSE American: EXOD) — the product line driving ~97% of company revenue.
- Develops and operates the public XO Swap API: ~12M requests/day, 1.5M monthly active users, 10+ external B2B partners; event-driven over Kafka and BullMQ where idempotency, retries, and data integrity are non-negotiable.
- Designed and executed zero-downtime, multi-phase data migrations; removed ~28k net lines of code while consolidating fragmented services.
- Built AI-assisted observability tooling integrating monitoring platforms with LLM agents for faster incident analysis.
- Earlier: production Solidity across Treasure DAO and Anonymice (cross-chain NFT bridge, on-chain game, Chainlink VRF/Price Feeds, soul-bound tokens).

## Projects

- [remote-mcp-starter](https://github.com/cdotta/remote-mcp-starter) — open-source, production-grade template for remote MCP servers (Hono, Better Auth personal access tokens, stateless Streamable HTTP, tenant isolation, full integration tests).
- [Journal](https://journal.crisislabs.dev/welcome) — a digital Bullet Journal: fast daily and monthly logging, habit tracking, and LLM-assisted paste-and-parse capture (React Router, Prisma, Capacitor).

## Contact

Open to senior backend and distributed-systems roles, remote across the Americas. Best reached at cdotta90@gmail.com.
